title: Set 1: A Camping Adventure 🏕️
instructions_en: READ THE STORY. CHOOSE A WORD FROM THE BOX. WRITE THE CORRECT WORD NEXT TO NUMBERS 1–5. THERE IS ONE EXAMPLE.
story_segments: Last weekend, my family and I went camping in the mountains. We arrived in the afternoon and put up our
near a small river. After that, we decided to explore the
nearby. My dad wanted to find some

to make a fire for cooking our dinner.

As the sun went down, it became very dark. I used my
to see the path, but suddenly I heard a strange noise behind a tree. It was a bit
, but it was just a small rabbit! We walked over a wooden
and finally got back to our camp. We cooked sausages and talked about the stars. It was a wonderful night!

title_question.prompt: Now choose the best name for the story. Write a letter:

options.text: An exciting night in the mountains

explanations_vi: Sau khi dựng lều, họ đi khám phá khu rừng (forest) gần đó.
Bố muốn tìm củi (wood) để nhóm lửa nấu ăn.
Tối tối tối, tôi dùng đèn pin (torch) để nhìn đường.
Nghe tiếng động lạ sau cây — hơi đáng sợ (scary) nhưng chỉ là con thỏ!
Họ đi qua cây cầu gỗ (bridge) để quay về trại.
Tiêu đề B tóm tắt đúng nhất: một đêm thú vị ở núi.
